report.technique: Right shoulder MRI without contrast at 3T.
report.findings: Rotator cuff: full-thickness tear of the right supraspinatus tendon, retracted to the level of the glenoid. Right infraspinatus and subscapularis tendons intact. Labrum: anterior labral tear on the right. Right AC joint: degenerative change. Bones: no fracture.
report.impression:
1. Full-thickness left supraspinatus tear with anterior labral tear on the left.
2. Left AC joint degenerative change.
